scripts.install-server: cd server && bash -c 'if command -v python3.12 >/dev/null 2>&1; then PY=python3.12; elif command -v python3.11 >/dev/null 2>&1; then PY=python3.11; else PY=python3; fi; [ ! -d venv ] && "$PY" -m venv venv; . venv/bin/activate && pip install -U pip && pip install -r requirements.txt'
scripts.install-all: npm run install-client && npm run install-server
